file_name: Salesforce Qualified - third party questionnaire - February 2026.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Salesforce and Qualified are close competitors and there are not many alternatives or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.

Outline any concerns regarding Salesforce’s ability and incentive, following the Acquisition, to foreclose rival suppliers of conversation automation solutions from accessing the Salesforce platform, for example, by limiting interoperability or bundling services.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Salesforce and/or Qualified.
